Real Estate Egypt Launches

Whether searching for a new home or looking for the next lucrative investment opportunity, you’ll find what you need in the Egyptian real estate market's new launches.

The market has been booming for decades with no signs of slowing down. This is clearly seen in the abundance of new launches all over the country. In fact, most real estate companies in Egypt have added new projects and compounds to their portfolios in the past couple of years.

Purchasing a property in a newly launched project may seem like a risk; however, with the array of advantages they offer, it might be the smartest choice. Through Nawy, you can learn more about newly launched projects in the Egyptian real estate market and effortlessly buy your future home.

What are the Advantages of Getting a Home in a New Launch?

  • Having access to better prices and deals
  • Picking the most suitable location
  • Being the first to move in!

Usually, real estate companies start by collecting expressions of interest (EOI) during the first phase of a project before they start selling the properties listed.

What are Real Estate Expressions of Interest (EOI)?

An expression of interest (EOI) is an amount of money set by the project’s real estate developer, which shows a customer is interested in purchasing a property. Generally, each property type has its own EOI, and they are collected before the construction commences.

Here arises the question of where you should consider purchasing a home. In other words, which areas in Egypt are the best to live in?

Top Areas in Egypt To Buy Properties

The best residential compounds in Egypt can be found in the following areas:

  • New Administrative Capital
  • New Cairo
  • Sheikh Zayed
  • 6th of October City
  • 5th Settlement
  • Mostakbal City
  • Ain Sokhna
  • North Coast
  • New Zayed
  • 6th Settlement
  • Al Alamein
  • Ras El Hekma
  • Gouna

Choosing a home depends on many factors, but keep in mind that these areas are on a constant rise. This means that prices are drastically increasing, and this is a chance for you to hold your money’s value and invest in one of the lowest-risk types of investments.

Why Should You Consider Real Estate Investing?

Real estate investing in Egypt has always been one of the top ways to store money value. With the ongoing global economic crisis, investing in real estate is becoming more popular by the day.

The Egyptian real estate market has a diverse portfolio of properties. As a result, there is a wide range of options to choose from. So any amount you have can be used to purchase a property and become a lifetime investment. These investments can also be used as an additional source of income (by renting the property).

If you are considering investing in Egypt, new launches may be a wise decision.

First, because they will generally increase in value. Secondly, the new compounds offer you the first pick, so you can choose the best property. Last but not least, real estate new launch projects usually have smarter technologies and more sustainable facilities.

It is also worth noting that purchasing a property from the top real estate developers in Egypt can be a more secure form of investment, since they deliver higher quality, stick to delivery dates, and offer an overall better experience.

How To Buy Your Property in a New Launch?

To get a property in one of Egypt’s new compounds, you simply need to do these 4 steps:

  • Open this page (Nawy’s New Launches Page)
  • Learn everything you need to know about the best new launches
  • Choose the most suitable project to purchase a unit in
  • Easily reserve your property through the call or WhatsApp buttons.

FAQs

Where to find new launch projects in Egypt online?

On Nawy's ‘New Launches’ page

What are the benefits of buying during a launch phase?

During the launch phase, prices tend to be lower and you will have all options available to pick from.

Can I resell my unit before the project is completed?

Usually, yes most real estate developers allow reselling before completing, but it depends on each developer’s policies. Our property consultants can advise you on that.

Will prices increase after the launch phase?

Typically, prices increase after the initial launch, but it depends on the developer & the project.
